art_market.summary: Seoul's art scene remains highly active with landmark exhibitions defining late March 2026.
key_events: Spectrosynthesis Seoul at Art Sonje Center: Groundbreaking exhibition of queer art (opened March 20).
Kim Yun Shin: Two Be One at Hoam Museum of Art: Major retrospective for the 92-year-old sculptor (opened March 17).
Seoul Museum of Art (SeMA): Ongoing exhibitions including 'Where Beings Be' and new inaugural programming at the Seo-Seoul branch.
Upcoming: Centre Pompidou Hanwha Seoul scheduled for May 2026; Damien Hirst retrospective at MMCA.
art_market.outlook: Strong institutional programming continues to solidify Seoul's status as a major global art destination.

stock_market.summary: KOSPI closed at 5,781.20 as of March 20, 2026, marking a 0.31% gain amid hopes for regional geopolitical stabilization.

key_indicators.Key_Drivers: Geopolitical developments concerning the Iran conflict and foreign investor activity.
key_indicators.Outlook: Investors remain focused on external geopolitical stability indicators and semiconductor sector performance.
